recap: Morocco dominated the second half to eliminate co-hosts Canada 3-0 in Houston, with Azzedine Ounahi scoring twice after the interval to break open a tightly contested match in which Canadian goalkeeper Maxime Crépeau had kept his team in contention through a disciplined first-half display. After weathering early Canadian pressure and a bright start from Jonathan David and Tani Oluwaseyi, Morocco seized control following Ounahi's opening goal five minutes into the second half, then sealed their quarterfinal berth with two quick strikes from Ounahi and Soufiane Rahimi in the closing stages.
